title: Elytra weave cape but without cape (15th anniversary)
description: Elytra weave cape but without cape (15th anniversary)
body:
Some people, including myself, may not be able to use the cloak in-game for whatever reason, so I came up with the idea of ​​making the Elytra texture change without the need for the cloak....Using this resource pack, you can use the texture of this cloak for your Elytra....In the not too distant future I will be making Elytro textures from other capes as well, and if a new cape is released one day I will make a texture for it as soon as possible.I hope you enjoy-A simple resourcepack that retextures the Elytra to look like a cape — even if you're not wearing one! Perfect for players who want that cape look without actually equipping a cape.
✨ No OptiFine required, works on vanilla
